creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org

Sage fails with (unrelated):
checking for Python... build/bin/sage-system-python: error: none of python python3 python3.8 python3.7 python2.7 python3.6 python2 is a suitable Python with urllib
configure: error: You do not have a suitable version of Python installed

Build box provided by bofh@ (thanks!)
